desc: Offline route-finding for the op-115 stall: the first PHY-IP PLL read at 0x417040090 hangs (read side; done/2026-07-14-t6040-pcie-op115-read-result.md). Statically disassemble the paired M4 kernelcache ApplePCIe/PHY bring-up to find the missing aperture precondition — clock/power/enable ordering, an aperture-enable register, or an Apple transition — before any PHY-IP access. ADT-derived addresses only; never invent offsets. Output: evidence writeup + a new candidate manifest for cross-review; no live run without fresh static evidence + approval (NEXT_STEPS 0.1 closing directive). Unblocks PCIe link-up, then WiFi/BT (044 port0 manifest is the stage after).
author: claude
